properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Through You I can do anything I can do all things 'Cause it's You who gives me strength Nothing is impossible Through You Blind eyes are opened Strongholds are broken I am living by faith Nothing is impossible

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I'm not gonna live by what I see I'm not gonna live by what I feel Deep down I know that You're here with me I know that You can do anything

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Through You I can do anything I can do all things 'Cause it's You who gives me strength Nothing is impossible Through You Blind eyes are opened Strongholds are broken I am living by faith Nothing is impossible

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I'm not gonna live by what I see I'm not gonna live by what I feel Deep down I Know that You're here with me I know that You can do anything

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Through You I can do anything I can do all things 'Cause it's You who gives me strength Nothing is impossible Through You Blind eyes are opened Strongholds are broken I am living by faith Nothing is impossible

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I believe, I believe I believe, I believe in You I believe, I believe I believe, I believe in You I believe, I believe I believe, I believe in You I believe, I believe I believe, I believe in You

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Through You I can do anything I can do all things 'Cause it's You who gives me strength Nothing is impossible Through You Blind eyes are opened Strongholds are broken I am living by faith Nothing is impossible

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: I believe, I believe I believe, I believe in You I believe, I believe I believe, I believe in You
